title: 🌩 Unspoken Logic Storms
name: Unspoken Logic Storms
what_it_is: Cognitive-collapse weather—storms that erupt from violated logic, filling environments with paradox lightning and syntax fog.
how_to_use: he invoked a truth that couldn’t exist—the storm began
she walks through logicfog—nothing means anything the same way twice
animation_behavior: Words spark and crash, meaning loops break mid-sentence, storm pulses on failed inference
